module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt/step orchestration. It carries host System metadata through SessionContext from preview handling into initial prompt rendering, routes all SessionEvent traffic through Session before client/host/task dispatch, re-exports the top-level step::Step runtime type, and lets Task parse Plan output, store (Plan, StepSignature list) records in TaskState::plan_list, reject unit Intent steps, enforce a ten-step TaskState::step_count limit, and assign authoritative step numbers.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. DeepseekBackend loads its config and issues streaming Deepseek chat-completions requests with a provider-supported user-role single-message payload preserving request.prompt as content.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Defines the agent prompt interface, render_template conditional/variable rendering, and InitialPrompt variables for System, Context, NoPreviewTask, and Tools.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup/routing behavior, the local task event worker/channel, total route_session_event dispatch policy, and SessionContext storage for host System metadata, task previews, and tool previews.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns the top-level agent runtime Step type re-exported by lib.rs and consumed by task runtime state and step execution helpers.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns task runtime state that imports the top-level Step type, sends SessionEvents through session_tx, parses Plan output with Plan::parse, stores parsed plans in plan_list, rejects unit Intent steps before insertion, fails new steps once the ten-step limit is reached, assigns step.signature.step_no in run_step, and splits private step/execution routing into task_step.rs and task_execution.rs.
